instruction: Two issues on the stop circle icon: the base outline is wrongly tinted red, AND the blue header bar on top is the wrong color (blue). Fix both.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/stop-circle.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #e63946" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M21 12a9 9 0 1 1-18 0 9 9 0 0 1 18 0Z"/>
  <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M9 9.563C9 9.252 9.252 9 9.563 9h4.874c.311 0 .563.252.563.563v4.874c0 .311-.252.563-.563.563H9.564A.562.562 0 0 1 9 14.437V9.564Z"/></g>
  <rect id="bar" fill="#3b82f6" x="16" y="12" width="96" height="6" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/stop-circle.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M21 12a9 9 0 1 1-18 0 9 9 0 0 1 18 0Z"/>
  <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M9 9.563C9 9.252 9.252 9 9.563 9h4.874c.311 0 .563.252.563.563v4.874c0 .311-.252.563-.563.563H9.564A.562.562 0 0 1 9 14.437V9.564Z"/></g>
  <rect id="bar" fill="#3b82f6" x="16" y="12" width="96" height="6" />
</svg>
